subject: [PATCH v3] mm/lruvec: trace LRU add drains and drain-all requests

reviews.author: Shakeel Butt
reviews.summary: Identified a potential benefit in tracing LRU cache draining for insight into cache behavior. Considered the low risk of breaking existing code with this change.

reviews.author: Vlastimil Babka (SUSE)
reviews.summary: Agreed with Shakeel that the risk of breaking existing code is low and expressed confidence in the patch's goals.

2026-06-17.patch_summary: The patch aims to add tracing for LRU cache draining and drain-all requests.
